External Id - Name: A name identifying the External ID
External Id - Value: The value of the identifier provided by the external system
Account - Email Address: The email address of the Account
Account - Custom Field - Status: Salesforce Account status: Active or Inactive

Account - Custom Field - Regulatory Trai: Regulatory Training Type (FAA - Part 91, FAA - Part 135, EASA, TC, Other) (Multiple values should be separated by pipes, e.g. 'a|b|c') (Optional)
